meaning: adj.没有立下遗嘱的,不能根据遗嘱处分的n.无遗嘱的死亡者
examples: I know he did not leave any valid WILL because he died intestate.
The thesis analyses the tendency in correlative aspects of testamental succession and intestate succession.
When someone dies intestate, the property automatically go to the survive partner unless there are children.
Probate records were recently filed showing that Winehouse died intestate, meaning without a valid will.
What if you die intestate with a second spouse and kids from a first marriage?
